wallet_product.name: Xcelsior Compute Credits
wallet_product.description: Prepaid CAD wallet balance for GPU compute on Xcelsior. Deposits credit your account; usage is metered per GPU-hour.

platform_services.name: Xcelsior Serverless Inference
platform_services.description: Serverless GPU endpoints — billed per worker running second at the selected GPU tier rate (Novita-aligned metering).

platform_services.name: Xcelsior Persistent Storage
platform_services.description: Persistent block volumes — $0.03 CAD per GB per month.

platform_services.description: Observability / future billing — input tokens per million (reference rate).

platform_services.name: Xcelsior Serverless Output Tokens
platform_services.description: Observability / future billing — output tokens per million (reference rate).

reserved_commitments.description: 20% off on-demand GPU rates · 1-month commitment · min 4 hrs/day.
